mapper.select: SELECT CITY_NO , CITY_NAME , LOCAL_PRODUCT , HOT_PLACE , CITY_POPULATION , CITY_AREA , PROVINCE_NO FROM CITY ORDER BY CITY_NO
SELECT CITY_NO , CITY_NAME , LOCAL_PRODUCT , HOT_PLACE , CITY_POPULATION , CITY_AREA , PROVINCE_NO FROM CITY WHERE CITY_NO = #{cityNo} ORDER BY CITY_NO
SELECT CITY_NO , PROVINCE_NAME , CITY_NAME , LOCAL_PRODUCT , HOT_PLACE FROM CITY JOIN PROVINCE USING(PROVINCE_NO) WHERE HOT_PLACE LIKE '%'||#{hotPlace}||'%' ORDER BY CITY_NO
SELECT CITY_NO , PROVINCE_NAME , CITY_NAME , LOCAL_PRODUCT , HOT_PLACE FROM CITY JOIN PROVINCE USING(PROVINCE_NO) WHERE LOCAL_PRODUCT LIKE '%'||#{product}||'%' ORDER BY CITY_NO
